question: 请分析江苏省A市农商行的各项存款余额从2025年一季度末到2026年一季度末的逐季变化，各季度末数值是多少？哪个季度数值最高？
s2sql:
SELECT data_date, metric_value,
       metric_value - LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY data_date) AS quarter_change
FROM bank_metric_daily
WHERE org_code = 'ORG001'
  AND metric_code = 'ZB001'
  AND data_date IN ('2025-03-31', '2025-06-30', '2025-09-30', '2025-12-31', '2026-03-31')
ORDER BY data_date

question: 对江苏省D市农商行在2025-07-31的存款、贷款、不良率、净利润四项关键指标与全省均值逐一对比。
s2sql:
SELECT o.org_code, o.org_name, d.metric_code,
       AVG(d.metric_value) AS aggregate_value,
       MIN(d.metric_value) AS min_value,
       MAX(d.metric_value) AS max_value,
       COUNT(*) AS observation_count
FROM bank_metric_daily d
JOIN bank_organization o ON o.org_code = d.org_code
WHERE d.data_date BETWEEN '2025-07-31' AND '2025-07-31'
  AND d.metric_code IN ('ZB013', 'ZB011', 'ZB001', 'ZB002') AND d.org_code IN ('ORG004')
GROUP BY o.org_code, o.org_name, d.metric_code
ORDER BY d.metric_code, aggregate_value DESC, o.org_code

question: 从2024年末到2026-03-31，全省各项存款余额增幅排名前三的是哪几家？增幅各是多少？
s2sql:
WITH values_at_dates AS (
  SELECT data_date, org_code, metric_code, metric_value
  FROM bank_metric_daily
  WHERE data_date IN ('2026-03-31', '2025-12-31')
    AND metric_code IN ('ZB001')
), pivoted AS (
  SELECT org_code, metric_code,
         MAX(CASE WHEN data_date = '2026-03-31' THEN metric_value END) AS current_value,
         MAX(CASE WHEN data_date = '2025-12-31' THEN metric_value END) AS baseline_value
  FROM values_at_dates
  GROUP BY org_code, metric_code
)
SELECT o.org_code, o.org_name, p.metric_code, p.current_value, p.baseline_value,
       p.current_value - p.baseline_value AS absolute_change,
       CASE WHEN p.baseline_value = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE (p.current_value - p.baseline_value) * 100.0 / p.baseline_value END AS percent_change
FROM pivoted p
JOIN bank_organization o ON o.org_code = p.org_code
ORDER BY p.metric_code, p.org_code

question: 分析江苏省A市农商行在2026-04-30的各项存款余额环比（较上月）和同比（较去年同期）的变化情况。
s2sql:
WITH values_at_dates AS (
  SELECT data_date, metric_value
  FROM bank_metric_daily
  WHERE org_code = 'ORG001'
    AND metric_code = 'ZB001'
    AND data_date IN ('2026-04-30', '2026-03-31')
), current_row AS (
  SELECT metric_value AS current_value FROM values_at_dates WHERE data_date = '2026-04-30'
), baseline_row AS (
  SELECT metric_value AS baseline_value FROM values_at_dates WHERE data_date = '2026-03-31'
)
SELECT current_value, baseline_value,
       current_value - baseline_value AS absolute_change,
       CASE WHEN baseline_value = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE (current_value - baseline_value) * 100.0 / baseline_value END AS percent_change
FROM current_row CROSS JOIN baseline_row

question: 2025年全年，江苏省B市农商行的不良贷款率有多少天高于全省均值？
s2sql:
WITH values_at_date AS (
  SELECT o.org_code, o.org_name, d.metric_value
  FROM bank_metric_daily d
  JOIN bank_organization o ON o.org_code = d.org_code
  WHERE d.data_date = '2025-12-31' AND d.metric_code = 'ZB013'
), provincial AS (SELECT AVG(metric_value) AS provincial_average FROM values_at_date)
SELECT v.org_code, v.org_name, v.metric_value, p.provincial_average,
       CASE WHEN v.metric_value > p.provincial_average THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS meets_condition
FROM values_at_date v CROSS JOIN provincial p
ORDER BY v.org_code

  SELECT o.org_code, o.org_name, d.metric_value
  FROM bank_metric_daily d
  JOIN bank_organization o ON o.org_code = d.org_code
  WHERE d.data_date = '2025-12-31' AND d.metric_code = 'ZB012'
), provincial AS (SELECT AVG(metric_value) AS provincial_average FROM values_at_date)
SELECT v.org_code, v.org_name, v.metric_value, p.provincial_average,
       CASE WHEN v.metric_value > p.provincial_average THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS meets_condition
FROM values_at_date v CROSS JOIN provincial p
ORDER BY v.org_code

question: 江苏省A市农商行从2025年上半年末到年末，存款、贷款、不良率和净利润的变动方向分别是什么？
s2sql:
WITH values_at_dates AS (
  SELECT data_date, org_code, metric_code, metric_value
  FROM bank_metric_daily
  WHERE data_date IN ('2025-12-31', '2025-06-30')
    AND metric_code IN ('ZB013', 'ZB011', 'ZB001', 'ZB002') AND org_code IN ('ORG001')
), pivoted AS (
  SELECT org_code, metric_code,
         MAX(CASE WHEN data_date = '2025-12-31' THEN metric_value END) AS current_value,
         MAX(CASE WHEN data_date = '2025-06-30' THEN metric_value END) AS baseline_value
  FROM values_at_dates
  GROUP BY org_code, metric_code
)
SELECT o.org_code, o.org_name, p.metric_code, p.current_value, p.baseline_value,
       p.current_value - p.baseline_value AS absolute_change,
       CASE WHEN p.baseline_value = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE (p.current_value - p.baseline_value) * 100.0 / p.baseline_value END AS percent_change
FROM pivoted p
JOIN bank_organization o ON o.org_code = p.org_code
ORDER BY p.metric_code, p.org_code

s2sql:
SELECT o.org_code, o.org_name, d.metric_code,

       MAX(d.metric_value) AS max_value,
       COUNT(*) AS observation_count

GROUP BY o.org_code, o.org_name, d.metric_code
ORDER BY d.metric_code, aggregate_value DESC, o.org_code

question: 在2025-12-31，有多少家农商行的不良贷款率低于全省均值？
s2sql:
WITH values_at_date AS (
  SELECT o.org_code, o.org_name, d.metric_value
  FROM bank_metric_daily d
  JOIN bank_organization o ON o.org_code = d.org_code
  WHERE d.data_date = '2025-12-31' AND d.metric_code = 'ZB013'
), provincial AS (SELECT AVG(metric_value) AS provincial_average FROM values_at_date)
SELECT v.org_code, v.org_name, v.metric_value, p.provincial_average,
       CASE WHEN v.metric_value < p.provincial_average THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS meets_condition
FROM values_at_date v CROSS JOIN provincial p
ORDER BY v.org_code

question: 江苏省A市农商行在2026-04-30的净利息收入占营业收入的比重有多大？
s2sql:
SELECT o.org_code, o.org_name,
       MAX(CASE WHEN d.metric_code = 'ZB008' THEN d.metric_value END) AS numerator_value,
       MAX(CASE WHEN d.metric_code = 'ZB009' THEN d.metric_value END) AS denominator_value,
       CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN d.metric_code = 'ZB009' THEN d.metric_value END) = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE MAX(CASE WHEN d.metric_code = 'ZB008' THEN d.metric_value END) * 100.0 /
                 MAX(CASE WHEN d.metric_code = 'ZB009' THEN d.metric_value END) END AS ratio_percent

  SELECT data_date, metric_value

question: 2025年12月31日，有多少家农商行的贷款余额超过了全省平均值？
s2sql:
WITH values_at_date AS (
  SELECT o.org_code, o.org_name, d.metric_value
  FROM bank_metric_daily d
  JOIN bank_organization o ON o.org_code = d.org_code
  WHERE d.data_date = '2025-12-31' AND d.metric_code = 'ZB002'
), provincial AS (SELECT AVG(metric_value) AS provincial_average FROM values_at_date)
SELECT v.org_code, v.org_name, v.metric_value, p.provincial_average,
       CASE WHEN v.metric_value > p.provincial_average THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS meets_condition
FROM values_at_date v CROSS JOIN provincial p
ORDER BY v.org_code

question: 江苏省E市农商行2025年底的对公客户数和个人客户数分别是多少？合计多少？
s2sql:
SELECT o.org_code, o.org_name, d.metric_code,
       SUM(d.metric_value) AS aggregate_value,
       MIN(d.metric_value) AS min_value,
       MAX(d.metric_value) AS max_value,
       COUNT(*) AS observation_count
FROM bank_metric_daily d
JOIN bank_organization o ON o.org_code = d.org_code
WHERE d.data_date BETWEEN '2025-12-31' AND '2025-12-31'
  AND d.metric_code IN ('ZB021', 'ZB020') AND d.org_code IN ('ORG005')
GROUP BY o.org_code, o.org_name, d.metric_code
ORDER BY d.metric_code, aggregate_value DESC, o.org_code

question: 2026年3月末，江苏省G市农商行的个人贷款和对公贷款分别占各项贷款的比例？
s2sql:
SELECT o.org_code, o.org_name,
       MAX(CASE WHEN d.metric_code = 'ZB005' THEN d.metric_value END) AS numerator_value,
       MAX(CASE WHEN d.metric_code = 'ZB002' THEN d.metric_value END) AS denominator_value,
       CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN d.metric_code = 'ZB002' THEN d.metric_value END) = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE MAX(CASE WHEN d.metric_code = 'ZB005' THEN d.metric_value END) * 100.0 /
                 MAX(CASE WHEN d.metric_code = 'ZB002' THEN d.metric_value END) END AS ratio_percent
FROM bank_metric_daily d
JOIN bank_organization o ON o.org_code = d.org_code
WHERE d.data_date = '2026-03-31'
  AND d.metric_code IN ('ZB005', 'ZB002') AND d.org_code IN ('ORG007')
GROUP BY o.org_code, o.org_name
ORDER BY o.org_code
